## Validation

## Diligence quality checklist

- [ ] Separates provided material from externally verified evidence
- [ ] Marks unknowns instead of inventing facts
- [ ] Includes AI moat / model dependency checks when relevant
- [ ] Includes follow-up questions and next verification actions
